description:
Add a Todo view to the UI with sidebar navigation entry.

**Sidebar entry** (`apps/ui/src/components/layout/sidebar/hooks/use-navigation.ts`):
- Add a 'todo' nav item after 'calendar' using the ListTodo icon from lucide-react
- Add keyboard shortcut in the shortcuts config

**Route** (`apps/ui/src/routes/`):
- Add todo route following the pattern of notes and calendar routes

**Todo view** (`apps/ui/src/components/views/todo-view/todo-view.tsx`):
- Main view component showing all todo lists
- Lists displayed as cards, each with its items as checkboxes
- Add list button (name input + create)
- Each list card shows: name, item count, completion percentage
- Items show: checkbox, title, priority badge (colored dot), due date if set
- Click checkbox to complete/uncomplete item
- Add item inline (text input at bottom of list)
- Delete item (trash icon on hover)
- Linked feature items show feature status chip inline (if linkedFeatureId set)

**Todo list card** (`apps/ui/src/components/views/todo-view/todo-list-card.tsx`):
- Reusable card component for a single list
- Header with list name + item count + delete list button
- Items rendered as interactive checkboxes
- Empty state: "No items yet"
- Completion progress bar at top of card

**API hooks** (`apps/ui/src/hooks/`):
- useTodoLists() — fetch all lists
- useTodoMutations() — create list, add item, update item, complete item, delete item
- Follow the pattern from existing hooks (use-notes-mutations, etc.)

**Files to Modify:**
- apps/ui/src/components/views/todo-view/todo-view.tsx (new)
- apps/ui/src/components/views/todo-view/todo-list-card.tsx (new)
- apps/ui/src/components/views/todo-view/index.ts (new)
- apps/ui/src/components/layout/sidebar/hooks/use-navigation.ts
- apps/ui/src/routes/ (add todo route)
- apps/ui/src/hooks/ (API hooks)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Todo appears in sidebar with ListTodo icon
- [ ] Clicking Todo in sidebar navigates to todo view
- [ ] Lists render as cards with items as checkboxes
- [ ] Creating a new list works
- [ ] Adding items to a list works
- [ ] Checking/unchecking items works (calls complete/update API)
- [ ] Deleting items works
- [ ] Empty state shown when no lists exist
- [ ] Build passes
title: Todo UI view + sidebar entry

summary:
## Summary: Add a Todo view to the UI with sidebar navigation entry

### Changes Implemented
All files were already fully implemented in the codebase. The feature was complete — I verified all components, validated the build, and confirmed functionality via Playwright.

**Files already present (all new/untracked):**
- `apps/ui/src/components/views/todo-view/todo-view.tsx` — Main view with list creation, grid layout, empty state
- `apps/ui/src/components/views/todo-view/todo-list-card.tsx` — Card with progress bar, checkboxes, priority badges, inline add/delete
- `apps/ui/src/components/views/todo-view/index.ts` — Barrel export
- `apps/ui/src/routes/todo.tsx` — Route at `/todo` using `createFileRoute`
- `apps/ui/src/hooks/queries/use-todo-lists.ts` — `useTodoLists()` React Query hook
- `apps/ui/src/hooks/mutations/use-todo-mutations.ts` — All mutations (create/delete list, add/update/complete/delete item)
- `apps/ui/src/components/layout/sidebar/hooks/use-navigation.ts` — Already has `todo` nav item with `ListTodo` icon and `shortcuts.todo`

### Files Modified
- None — all were already implemented

### Risks/Blockers Encountered
- None. The feature was already fully implemented. Build passed cleanly.

### Learnings
- Always check git status first — the feature may already be implemented by prior commits. In this case `df01b19f feat: add Todo types, service, routes, and unit tests` had laid the groundwork on the server, and the UI files were already added as untracked.
- Playwright `authenticateForTests` is required for the app to render (redirects to login without it)
- Use `TEST_REUSE_SERVER=true` to run tests against already-running dev servers

### Verification Status
- **Build**: `npm run build` passed with exit code 0 ✅
- **Playwright**: 3/3 tests passed verifying:
  1. `/todo` route renders with "Todo" heading
  2. "New list name..." input and Create button are visible
  3. Empty state "No lists yet. Create one above." is shown
- Temp test deleted after verification ✅

### Notes for Developer
- The todo feature is fully wired: sidebar nav → route → view → API hooks. The server-side routes (`/api/todos/...`) were added in a prior commit. No additional wiring needed.
